channel.title: City Walk ShenZhen
channel.description: Explore parks and scenic spots in Chinese citie

item.title: Shenzhen
item.description: Welcome to CityWalk's nationwide site summary navigation page. Click to jump to the corresponding city. You can explore sites in different provinces and cities. City Guides Over...
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to CityWalk's nationwide site summary navigation page. Click to jump to the corresponding city. You can explore sites in different provinces and cities.

item.title: A Level Scenic Spot
item.content:encoded:
Catalogue

  • Land King Sightseeing·Shenzhen-Hong Kong Window
  • Huaqiang North Pedestrian Street Scenic Area
  • Guangming Redwood Cultural Town
  • Rose Coast Cultural Tourism Resort
  • Shenzhen Happy Harbor Tourist Area
  • Shenzhen Baishiyuan Intangible Cultural Heritage Tourism Area
  • Gankeng Ancient Town Cultural Tourism Area
  • Pastoral on the Sea
  • Guangming Farm Grand View Garden
  • Guanlan Landscape and Rural Tourism and Cultural Park
  • Shuidishan Tourist Resort
  • OCT East
  • Green World
  • Shenzhen Wildlife Park
  • Fairy Lake Botanical Garden
  • OCT Tourism Resort-Window of the World
  • OCT Tourism Resort-Splendid China Folk Culture Village
  • OCT Tourism Resort-Happy Valley
  • OCT Tourism Resort-Happy Coast
  • Mission Hills Tourism and Leisure Resort

item.title: Comprehensive Park
item.description: A green space with rich content, suitable for various outdoor activities, and complete recreational and supporting management service facilities. Catalogue Guangming District Na...
item.content:encoded:
A green space with rich content, suitable for various outdoor activities, and complete recreational and supporting management service facilities.

Catalogue

Guangming District

  • Hongqiao Park
  • Kaiming Park
  • Shek Wai Park
  • New Town Park
  • Baicao Garden
  • Phoenix Park
  • Nanguang Secret Park
  • Mingxin Garden
  • Beigang Back Mountain Park
  • City Square
  • Green Lake Park (Loucun Water)
  • Guishan Park
  • Minghu City Park
  • Tangjiadong Street Park
  • Hudishan Park
  • Baihuadong Revolutionary Martyrs Park
  • Dongzhou Culture Park
  • Honghuashan Park

Nanshan District

  • Songpingshan Park
  • Lixiang Park
  • Qianhai Park
  • Shigushan Park
  • Xili Ecological Park
  • Xiaonanshan Park
  • Left Battery Park
  • Zhongxing Park
  • Qianhai Guiwan Park
  • Qianhai Sports Park
  • Shenzhen Soil and Water Conservation Technology Demonstration Park
  • Shenzhen Bay Coastal Leisure Belt West Section
  • Cloud Garden
  • Nanhai Park
  • Back Seaside Park
  • Sihai Park
  • Moon Bay Park
  • Zhongshan Park
  • Bauhinia Garden
  • Center River Estuary Park
  • Dasha River Park
  • Nanshan Park
  • Dasha River Ecological Corridor
  • Shenzhen Bay Park
  • Shenzhen Talent Park
  • Qianhai Stone Park
  • Performing Arts Park
  • Technology Park
  • Lilin Park

Pingshan District

  • Dashanpi Theme Park
  • Kengzi Community Park
  • Wumafeng Park
  • Julongshan Ecological Park
  • Pingshan Guangzu Park
  • Shenzhen Pingshan District Central Park
  • Yanziling Ecological Park
  • Jinniu Park (Rule of Law Park)
  • Tangkeng Water Park

Dapeng District

  • Dapeng Revolutionary Martyrs Cemetery
  • Baguang Water Ecological Park
  • Baguang Flower Sea
  • Baisha Bay Park
  • Kwai Chung Park
  • Hetang Landscape Park

Bao'an District

  • Bougainvillea Valley Park
  • Haoxiang Lake Park
  • Qilongshan Park
  • Shajing Park
  • Lion Rock Park
  • Tiezaishan Park
  • Niuhuangshan Park
  • Yanling Park
  • Binhai Cultural Park
  • Jiangangshan Park
  • Jute Park
  • Riverside Park
  • Lingzhi Park
  • Xitou Football Field Leisure Park
  • Xinqiao Citizen Square
  • Pingluanshan Park
  • Dazhongshan Park
  • Lixin Lake Park
  • Wangniuting Park
  • Five Finger Rake Park
  • Qilin Mountain Park (Hundred Flowers Garden)
  • Bao'an Park
  • Egret Lake Park
  • Bihaiwan Park
  • Cuigang Park
  • Dawangshan Park
  • Nanchang Park

Yantian District

  • Yantian Central Park
  • Sea of Clouds Park
  • Meisha Bay Park
  • Seaview Park
  • Sea Mountain Park
  • Neihu Park
  • Dameisha Seaside Park
  • Yandunshan International Friendship Park
  • Enshang Ancient Village Ecological Park
  • Reservoir leisure park group
  • Shenzhen Constitution Park
  • Yantian Shuangyong Park

Futan District

  • Xiangmi Park
  • Caitian Park
  • Huanggang Park
  • Shenzhen Central Park
  • Futian Mangrove Ecological Park
  • Merlin Park
  • Shenzhen International Garden and Flower Expo Park
  • Guihua Road Urban Park
  • Civic Center Plaza
  • Lianhuashan Park
  • Beacon Hill Park
  • Lychee Park

Luohu District

  • East Lake Park
  • Honghu Park
  • People's Park
  • Yuanke Park
  • Buxinshan Park
  • Weiling Park
  • Honggang Park
  • Acacia Forest Park

Longhua District

  • Baishilong Music Theme Park
  • Zhangge City Park
  • Zhangkengjing City Park
  • Yulong Park
  • Guanhu Central Park
  • Qiping Park
  • Shenzhen North Station Central Park
  • Civil Law Park
  • Qinghu Cultural Park
  • Longhua Park
  • Longhua Green Corridor Park
  • Qiuyuling City Park
  • Smoky Bridge Park
  • Yixiu Park

Longgang District

  • Universiade Park
  • Pat Sin Leng Park
  • Pingdi Park
  • Henggang People's Park
  • Snow Bamboo Trail Park
  • Dragon City Park
  • Yuanshan Scenic Area
  • Honghualing Park
  • Honghualing Low Carbon Environment Ecological Park
  • Pinghu Ecological Park
  • Longtan Park
  • Dragon City Plaza
  • Huilongpu Park
  • Zero Carbon Park
